pericopes.title: Nasopi them le themlou khol hih-in
Chidang namdang te dia Kipana Thupha

chapters.text: Paul, Jesu Christa soh, solchah dinga kikou; Pathen Thupha,
malaiya alekha thenga athemgao ho kama athutepsa,
a-Chapa thudol Thupha chu seiphongle dinga kisepdoh chun; ama chu tahsaphe lamah David chilhah-a penga ahin,
thenna lhagao lama vang chu athia kona a thodoh kit chun Pathen Chapa chu thuneitaha atun ahi chu aphongdoh tai.
Chidang namdangte jouse lah-a mi tahsan thua nunsah dinga ama vangle ama min jala lungsetna le solchah mun changa kahitai;
nangho jong amaho lah-a chu Jesu Christaa tia kikou nahiuve;
Rome a cheng mithenga kikou Pathen deite jouse hengah i-Pau Pathen le Pakai Jesu Christa a konin lungsetna le lungmon nalah-uva um jinghen.
Natahsanu vannoi jousea akithan jeh-in nabonchauva chungah Jesu Christa vanga ka-Pathen kathangvah masah ahi.
Katao chanin tang louvin naminu kapha jingin ahi;
tubeh-a hi nahenguva kahungna dingin, Pathen thusah a phat kijen kom khat katoa kahungjin teiteina dingin kathum jingin ahi, a-Chapa Thupha thua lhagaova alhacha kapan Pathen chu ahetoh ahi.
Nadetna dinguva lhagao lam thilpeh phabep nangho kapeh theina dingun nangho mu kago lheh jengin ahi.
Hichu nangho jong keima jong khat tahsana kona khat ikitilkhou touva nangho lah a lunghalna kanei theina dinga kati ahi.

Chule sopite, chidang namdangte lah a katohgim ga kamutah banga nangho lah a jong kamu theina dinga, tamtahvei nahenguva hung ding kakigotji chu nahet louvu kanompoi, ahivangin tu masangsen eisumo a um jingin ahi.
Greek mite le paomah hammahte ahin, mithem le mimol ahin, abonchauva kabat ahi.
Chuti chu ahin nangho Rome khoa um chengse jong Kipana Thupha kahil theichan kahil dinga kigosadem jing kahi.
Ijeh-inem itile Kipana Thupha hi kajachatpi hihhele, ajeh chu koi hile atahsan chan chu huhhingna dinga Pathen thahat ahi; amasan Judah mi ahin, abana Greek mi ahung hi.
Ajeh iham itile asunga tahsan le tahsana kona Pathen chonphatna akilanga ahi; hiche thudol chu, “Michonpha vang chu atahsan vanga hing ding ahi,” tin akisune.
Ajeh chu achonsetna a thutah doudala miho chu, a-Pathen ngaisah louvule achonsetna jouseu chungah vana konin Pathen lunghanna akilangin ahi;
ajeh chu Pathen lam thudol het theina chu alung sunguva akilangnai; ajeh chu Pathen in hichu ahenguva aphondoh ahitai.
Ijehham itile leiset semtila pa Pathen athahat kemlou le Pathen ahije hiti mutheilou thilteho chu athilsema kihedoha, kichentah-a kimu ahi jeh chun, amaho athuphatna dingu aumpoi.
Ajeh chu Pathen la ahenauvin Pathen bangin avahchoipouve, thangjong athangvah jipouve, athil ngaitou ahomkeo ahin angol lungu athimtan ahi.
Akichihsahnau lamah angoljo tauve.
chule kemtheilou Pathen loupitah chu kemthei mihem le alha leng vachaho, akengli, aoma kithol-ho ganhing limin akhelun ahou tauve.
Hiche jeh-a chu alah-uva atiu ja umlou tah-a bol dinga, amaho lunggot lam then louna lama Pathen in apehdoh ahitai.
Amahon Pathen thutah chu jouvin alhengun chule Asempau khelin thilsemjoh ahouvun ajenleuvin ahi. Hiche Sempa chu tonsot geiya nunnom jing ahi. Amen.
Hiche jeh-a chu Pathen in amaho jachat umtah huhna lama apehdoh ahitai, anumeiho jongun apenpiu angai monga achonnau apaiyun akaleh lamin achonun ahi;
apasal-ho jong angai monga numeitoh achonnau apaiyun huh lama alip’un pasal le pasal jachat umtah-in akibolun, achon gitlounau chu amahon ati chunguva akisan tauvin ahi.
Alunguva Pathen het ding amaho nom lou ahiuvin, hiche bangtah a chu Pathen in jong amaho lung chatvaina lama apehdoh ahitai.
Amaho chonsetna jouse, engset, papset, suhset lung adimset’un; chule thangset lung, toltha lung, kinahna, kidohabol, doulungpoh adimset’un ahi.
Guhthima mi seise, mihoutom, Pathen hotlam, chonval, hoitho, kithang-at, chonset thah boldoh, nulepa thua nunglou,
lungthimbei, thutepsa sukeh, hepina neilou, lungsetna neilou ahiuve.
Hitobanga chonho chu athi dinga lom mong ahiuve, hiche Pathen thutansa chu ahenasauvin achuti chonun ahi, amaho chang jong hilouvin, chutia chonho chu aphasah-un ahi.

Hiche jeh chun, mi oimoa pang, vo mihem, koi hile chun nangman jong nadonbutna ding a um poi; ajeh iham itile nangman mi na-oimona lama nangma themmo kichanho nahi. Ajeh chu mi oimoa pang, nangmatah jongin chutobang chu naboljin ahi.
Chutobanga chonseho chunga chun Pathen in thu atan hi thudih lam cheh-a ahi, ti iheuvin ahi.
Vo mihem, chutobanga chonte oimoa pang nangman chutobang chu naboljia ahile, Pathen thutanna a chun hoinange, tia nakiginchat mong em?
Ole Pathen phatna-in nalung heina dinga nangma napui chu helouva phatna, lungdehat khongaisot letset tah ahao hi nahsah louva nahim?
Nalungtah le lungheilou dungjuiya chu Pathen in thudih atan ni hung kiphonle alunghan nia dinga chu nachunga lunghanna nakikhol khom ahi.
Pathen in mi jouse atoh dungjui cheh-a asansah ding ahi.
Thilpha bola ponthoa lungdesot hatna, loupina, jana, chule kemlou holte chu hin kemlou apeh ding ahi;
kichang chuna kichamsah, thutah thua nung louva chonphatlou thua nungho vang chu achunguva lungsat le lunghan chua,
setna bol miho jouse lhagao chunga, amasa Judah mi chule abana Greek mite lhagao chunga, hesoh genthei le lungdonna khohtah chu ding ahi.
Thilpha bol chengse vang chu loupina, choiatna, chule lungmonna kipe ding ahi. Judah mi masantin chule Greek mi hiding ahi.
Ajeh chu Pathen in mi dat aneipoi.
Ajeh chu danthu neilouva chonseteho jouse chu danthu beiya manghel ding ahiuve; chule danthu noiya chonseteho jouse chu danthua athu kitan ding ahi.
Ajeh iham itile Pathen mitmua michonpha ho chu danthu ngaiya jaho ahipouve; danthu dungjuiya bolteho bou chu achonpha a kisim ding ahi.
Danthu neilou chidang namdangte jengbonin apenpi lungpoh-in danthun anungun danthu aneilou vangun amaho le amahon danthu akisemun ahi.
Alung sunguva danthu natoh kisun ahi ti chu alah-un ahi; hiche ase apha ahetnau chun ahettohsah-u ahi; chule amaho le amaho lunggel chun themmosah le themsah aumsah jiuvin ahi.
Hicheng chu ka-Thupha seiphongle dungjuiya, Pathen in Jesu Christa amanchah-a mihemte guhthim thu atan nileh chuti ding ahi.
Nangma Juda mia kisei nahia, danthua kinem nahia, Pathen nason ahia,
alungdol hea, thilpha chu pha sa a, danthua kona kihila het neiya,
chule danthua chihna le thutah umdan neiya nakiginchat jeh a mitchoho kaihoile muthim lah a umho salvah-a,
michinglouho chinsah-a naosenho hila nakingaito ahin;
chuti ahile mihila panga nang, nangma jong nachanga kihilji lou nahim? Guchat louna dinga thu hila pang, nangman naguji nganem?
Jonthanhoi bol louna dinga thu seiya, nangman jon nabolji nganem? Milim hou hoa nangma, nangman milim houna ina thil nachomji nganem?
Danthu songa nangma, nangman danthu nasukeh jin Pathen nanahsahmoji nganem?
Akisun bang bangin, nangho jeh-in Pathen min chidang nam dangte lah-a taitomin aumin ahi.
Nangma danthua nanunle nacheptan chu phatchomna nanei ding ahin, danthua nanun lou vangle nacheptan chu tanlou ahitai.
Chuti ahi jeh-a chu cheptanlou chun danthua chonna dol nitle, acheptanlou chu cheptana kisim lou ding ham?
Apena cheptanlou mong danthu nit soh chun lekhajema thule cheptan dan neiya jong danthu sukeh-a nangma nathemmosah lou ding ham?
Apolama mi mua Judah mi hichu Judah mitah ahipoi, apolam ati chunga cheptan jong chu cheptan ahipoi.
Asunggila Judah mi hibou chu Judah mi ahin, chule lekhajem a hilouva lhagaova lunggil lam cheptanbou chu cheptan ahi; ama chu mihem pachat loa hilouvin Pathen pachat alojoh ahi.
Chuti ahile Judah mi hi ipi phachom am? Chule cheptan jong iham aphatna?
Imalam jousea phachom tah ahi, abulpen chu, Pathen thu chengse amaho kipedoh-a kichinsah anahi.
Khattou touvin tahsan hih jongleu ihi dingham? Amaho tahsan lou chun Pathen tahsan umje hi manlou asochom em?
Chuti hihhen, Mi jouse ajou vangin Pathen chu dihtah ahi; hiche thudol hi, “Nangma nangma thuseiya chonpha tia nakisima, Thupitanna a jong najo theinan,” tin akisunin ahi.
Ahivangin ichonsetnau hin Pathen chonphatna chu akichetsah cheh-a ahile, ipi isei dingu ham? Lunghanga talen pejia Pathen dihlou ham? (Mihem dan banga kasei ahi.)
Chuti ahipoi, chuti ahile Pathen in vannoi leiset thupi iti atan dingham?
Keima jousei jeh-a Pathen dihje chu ama loupina khop’a letset tah a akihaphon cheh-a ahile, michonse tia themmo changa iti kaumnah lai dingham?
Chule keiho hehsetna a neiseiyu keiho hin, phatna ahung umna dingin, setna boluhite, ati neitiu banga chu, eihon ibola itida dingu ham? Chutobang thuseiho themlou achan chu adih lheh jenga ahi.

Chuti ahile keiho Judah mi hi midang sanga phajo kahiuvem? Itinama jongle kaphajo pouve. Chuti ahijeh chun keihon amasan Judah mi, chubanin Greek mi, chonset noiya um cheh ahi, tia kahilchahsa cheh-u ahitai.
Hiti jong hin akisune, “Chonpha koima aumpoi, khatcha jong aumpoi.
Koima ahetoh thema aumpoi, koima Pathen hola aumpoi,
Lam hilouva akihei soh keitauve, abonchauvin manlou asoh gamtauve. Apha lama chona aumpoi, khatcha jong aumpoi.
Alol homu lhan kihong ahi; aleiyun lheplhahna thu jeng aseiyin, Ane noiyuvah gulse gu au min;
Akam sungula sapsetna le thugilouvin adimin;
Akengu thi sona ding lamah ajangin;
Alampi jouseuva manna le hesohna aumin;
Lungmonna lampi ahetapouve;
Amitmuva Pathen gin aumpoi.
Mijouse kam binna dingle vannoi leiset pumpi Pathen thutana aum theina dinguva, danthun ihijongle asei chengse hi danthu thua nungho jah-a kisei ahi, ti iheuve.
Danthu juiya thilbola mi koima a ang sunga them changa umlou ding ahi. Ajeh iham itile danthua chonsetna kihedoh soh ahi.
Ahin tu vangin danthua hilouhel in, danthu le themgao ho thuhetsah Pathen chonphatna chu akilang dohtan ahi.
Chuche Pathena kon chonphatna chu Jesu Christa tahsan vanga atahsante jouse henga kilanga ahi; koima imachom a umpoi.
Ajeh chu mijouse hi chonsea ahitai, Pathen loupina chu changlela ahiuve.
Christa Jesua kilhatdohna aum jeh-a Pathen lungset vanga chonphat moh chanbou ahiuve.

Pathen lungdesot vanga masanga chonset kichaisaho talen pe louva aum jeh-in, achonphat vetsahna le Jesu tahsan chan chu chonpha akisim theina dinga, chule chutia abol jinga ama chonpha a aum jingna dinga,
tu laiya hi ama chonphat chu vetsahna a, tahsan vanga Jesu Christa thisana kithensona um chu hiche kithensona dinga chu ama atundoh ahitai.
Chuti ahile kisonna hoithona hoibaham? Kinotdoh-a ahitai. Ito bang danthua ham? Danthu juiya natohna ham? Ahipoi, tahsanna danthua joh ahibouve.
Chuti ahi jeh chun danthu juiya natoh vang hilouva, tahsan vanga mi chonpha kisim ahi, tia kangaitou ahi.
Pathen chu Judah mite changseh Pathen ham? Chidang namdangte Pathen jong hilou ham? Chidang namdangtea jong ahi.
Ahin Pathen khatseh ahi jeh chun, cheptanho chu tahsana kona chonpha asima chule cheptan louho chu tahsan vanga chonpha asim ding ahi.
Chuti ahile itahsan jeh-uva hi danthu kisumanga ham? Ahipoi; danthu kiphutdet joh ahibouve.
Chuti ahile tahsa lama ipuluiyu Abraham in amu chu ipi isei dinguham?
Ajeh iham itile ama chu natoh vanga chonpha kisim ahi le kisonna anei ahi, ahinla Pathen lamah aneipon ahi.
Ajeh chu Pathen lekhabun ipi aseiyem? Abraham in Pathen atahsan jalin atahsan chu ama dingin chonphat’in akisimtai.
Natongte sum san hi lungsetman kiti louvin, asan ding abat’in akiseijon ahi.
Ahinla Pathen helou natoh beiya chonpha chansahpa tahsana chu, atahsan chu chonphat a kisima ahi.
Natong louva Pathen in michonpha a asimho chu phatthei achan dingjeu chu, David jongin aseiyin,
“Asuhkhelnau kingaidama, chule achonsetna kikhukhum ho chu anunnomui.
Pakaiyin achonsetna asim lou dingpa chu anunnome,” ati.
Chuti ahi le chuche phattheina chu cheptante chung jenga ha, cheptan louho chunga jongham? Ajeh chu eihon Abraham in atahsan chu ama dinga chonphatna a kisim ahitai, itiu ahi.
Achutile iti aum pet’a chonpha kisim ham? Acheptan jou ha, cheptan louva aum laiya ham? chep tana aum jou hilouvin, cheptan louva aumlai ahi;
chule cheptan louva uma atahsan ho jouse pa ahi theina dingle amaho dinga chu chonphatna a akisim theina dinga, chule cheptan jeng jong hilouva ipuluiyu Abraham cheptan louva aum laiya atahsan chu,
hiche tahsan nungjuiya cheptanho pa jong ahi theina dinga, cheptan louva uma tahsan vanga chonphat chu hetna a melchihna a cheptan chu amu ahi.
Ajeh chu Abraham le achilhah chu, vannoi goulo ding ahi tia thutep chu danthua kon hilouvin, tahsana kona chonphat vanga joh ahibouve.
Ajeh iham itile danthua kona chonpha a kisimhon alou ahile, tahsan chu ahomkeo ahitai, chule thutep jong chu pannabei ahitai.
Ajeh chu danthun lunghan akonsah ahi; danthu beina a chun suhkhel jong aumpoi.

Hijeh a chu lungsetna a ahi theina a, danthu noiya umho chang jeng hilouva Abraham tahsan noiya um achilhahte jousen, hiche thutep alo dingu chu adet theina dinga, amahon alo dingu chu tahsan vanga alo dingu ahibouve.

Mi-thiho hinsah theiya, aum louho auma banga kou Pathen, Abraham in atahsan chu, ama angsunga Abraham chu ibon-chauva ikonnau ipuluiyu ahi; chule hitin jong akisune. “Keiman nangma vai tamtah konna puluiya kasem ahitai,” ati.
Chule kiholna neilou ahivangin, “Na-chilhah hijatpi khu hi ding ahi” tia asei thucheng dungjuiya khonungle vai tamtah pului ahung hi ding chu kiholin atahsan in ahi.
Chule kum ja khatjen alhina athisa tobang atahsa chule Sarah chin jong chu ngaiton atahsan doideh louhelin aumin.
Pathen thutep chu tahsanlel in aumpon ahi.
Pathen in athu-tep chu boljong abol thei ahi, ti ahechen in Pathen avahchoiyin atahsan ahat cheh-jotan ahi.
Hiche jeh a chu atahsan chu ama dinga chonphat a kisima ahitai.
Tahsan chu ama dingjenga chonphatna a kisima kisun ahipoi; eiho dinga jong kisun ahi.
Pakai Jesu Christa athia kona kaithoupa tahsana eiho, eiho dinga jong chonphatna a kisim ding ahi.
Hiche Jesu chu eiho suhkhel jeh a kipedoh ahitai; chule eiho chonpha a ikisimna dinguva kaithouva uma ahitai.
Chuti ahin tahsan vanga eiho chonphaa kisim ihitah jeh un i-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa vanga Pathentoh kichamdela um ihitauve.
Chujongle ama vanga chu hiche lungsetna idin detnauva hi tahsan vanga lut ihitauve; chule Pathen loupina a chu kinema kipah jinga um ihitauve.
Chule chuti jengseh hilouvin ihesoh gentheinau jenga jong kipah jinga um ihiuve, hesohna chun thohhat asosah-jin,
thohhat chun aphat photchenna asosah jin, photchenna chun kinepna asosahjin ahi, ti iheuve;
chule hiche kinepna chun eijumso pouve. Ajeh chu eipeh-u Lhagao Theng vanga chu ilung sunguva Pathen ngailutna long lut ahitai.
I-hatmo laiyuvin aphatchan michonse ho khelin anathitan ahi.
Michonpha chungchangah koima pouvin ahinna toh-ponte; mipha chungchanga ahinna toh ngam jong mi khattou umkhat nante.
Ahin Pathen in eingailut nau photchenna eimusah-un ahi; ajeh iham itile eiho chonset’a ium laitah un Christa eiho khelin athitan ahi.
Chuti ahi jeh chun eiho tun, Christa thisan vanga chonpha a kisim ihitah jeh-u chun, achungchona ama vanga Pathen lunghanna a kona huhhinga umtei ding ihiuve.
Ajeh chu adouva ipan laitah uva Pathen Chapa thi chun Pathen toh eisuhchamu ahitah a ahile, akicham jeh-a chu achungchona ama hinna vanga huhhinga umtei ding ihiuve.
Chuti jeng jong hilouvin, tun Pathentoh eisuhcham uva i-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa vanga Pathena pa jong ikipau ahi.
Hiti chu ahin, mi khat jeh a vannoiya chonset lut, chule chonset jeh a thina lut ahi; chutima chu mi jouse chonset jeh a thina chu mi jouse chunga lhungsoh ahitai.
Ajeh chu danthu kipeh masang-peh a chu vannoi leiset a chonset ana umsa ahin; ahivangin danthu um louna a chu chonset jong kisim lou ahi.
Ahivangin Adam a pat Mose geiyin Adam suhkhel banga sukhellou ho chunga jong, thina chun vai analosa ahi. Adam chu ahung dingpa lim banga um ahi.

Ahivangin manbeiya thilpeh chu suhkhel a toh kibang ahipoi; ajeh chu mi khat suhkhel jeh a midang jouse athia ahile, achungchon cheh-a Pathen lungset le mi khat, Jesu Christa lungset vanga thilpeh chu mi tamtah chunga letset a chua ahitai.
Chule thilpeh chu, achonsea mi khat jeh a chutoh akibangpoi; ajeh chu mi khat’a kona chu themmo channa lama thu kitan ahin, manbeiya thilpeh vang chu suhkhelna tamtah a kona them changa kisima ahi.

Ajeh chu mi khat suhkhel jeh-a, mi khat vanga chu thina-in vai alotah a ahile, lungsetna le chonphat thilpeh letset’a changho chu achungchon cheh-a, mi khat, Jesu Christa vanga hinna a vai alo dingu ahi.

Chuti chu ahin suhkhelna khat jeh a mi jouse themmo chansahna thutanna um ahi; chutima chu chonphatna thilbol khat vanga hinna lama them chansahna manbeiya thilpeh chu mi jouse chunga hung uma ahitai.
Ajeh chu mi khat’in thupeh apallhah jeh a mi tamtah chonse kisosah ahitan; chutima chu mi khat’in thupeh anit jeh a chu mi tamtah chonpha kiso ding ahi.
Amavang suhkhel punna dinga danthu hung lut be ahi; ahinla chonset’in thinaa vai alo bangtah a chu i-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa vanga hin kemlou channa dinga,
chonphat vanga lungsetna-in vai alo theina dinga, chonset punna chana chu lungsetna hapun cheh a ahi.
Achutile ipi isei dingu hitam? Lungsetna apun chehna dinga ichonset jing dingu ham?
Chuti ponte, Chonset lama athisa eiho, chonset’a iti ihin jing nahlai dingu ham?
Eiho Christa Jesua baptize chang chengse hi thina a baptize changa ihiu hi nahet louvuham?
Hiche jeh a chu Pa loupina vanga Christa athi lah a kona akaithou banga chu eiho jong hinkho thah lam chu ijot theina dinguva, baptize chana hi athina a amatoh kivuitha a ihitauvin ahi.
Ajeh chu ama thi lim banga ithiuva amatoh kijommat ihiule, athokit lim banga jong ithokit dingu ahi;
tu nung kalsea eiho chonset po tahsapum suhmanga aum theina dinga; miluiyu chu amatoh thingpela kikhetbeh tha a ahitai, ti chu iheuve;
ijeh ham itile athia chu chonset’a kona them changa ahitai.
Chule eiho Christa toh ithiu ahitah a ahile, amatoh ihin dingu jong ahi, ti chu itahsan un ahi;
ajeh chu athi lah-a kona kikaithou Christa chu imatih chana thi lou ding ahi, thina-in achungah thu aneitapoi, ti iheuve.
Athi chu chonset lama tonsot geiya dinga khatvei thia ahitai; ahing vang chu Pathen lama hinga ahi.
Hiche bang bang chun nangho jong chonsetna lamah athisan kigel unlang, Pathen lamah Christa Jesu’ah ahingin kigel un.
Hijeh chun natahsa lung got lama chonna dingin natahsa thithei chunga chun chonset vai pohsah hihhel un.

Chujongle natibah chengseu chonphat louna manchah-in chonsetna lamah pedoh hihhel un, ahin athi lah-a kona hingdoh kahi tin, Pathenah kipeuvin, natibah chengseu jong chu chonphatna manchah in Pathenah pedoh jouvin.
Ajeh chu chonset chun nachunguva thu neitalou ding ahi. Ijeh ham itile danthu noiya um nahitapouve. Lungsetna noiya umjoh nahiuve.
Ititan tem ahile? Danthu noiya um louva lungsetna noiya um ihi jeh uva chu, ichonset dingu ham? Chuti ponte.
Koi heng koi heng hijongle athua nung dinga asoh-a nalutna chu, thina dinga chonsetna lam hijongle chonphatna dinga thua nunna hijongle, athua naumpa soh chu nahi, hichu nahet louvuham?
Masangin nangho chonset soh nanahiu ahin, ahivangin lunggiltah a chutobang thu kihil chu nit dinga kipedoh a athu noiya um nahitauvin.
chule chonset’a kona kichoidoh-a chonphat soh nahiu ahitai. Hiche jeh chun Pathen thangvah-in um hen.

Natahsa pheu hatmo jeh-a keiman mihem thu banga kasei ahi; ajeh chu nanghon masang laiya natibah chengu then louna dinga chonset chunga chonsetna lama soh banga napehdoh jiu ahin, hiche bangtah chun tun natibah chengseu chu thenna dingin chonphatna lamah soh bangin pedoh jengun.
Nangho chonset soh nahi laiyun chonphatna lam dola onga nahiuvin ahi.
Chuti chu ahin tua najachatpiu thulam dola hi hiche laiya chu aga ipi namu jiuvem? Ajeh chu hitiho chu achaina thina ahibouve.
Tu vangin chonset’a kona onga Pathen soh nahitah jeh-un, thenna lama ga naneitauve, chule aleh chu tonsot hin kemlou ahi.
Ijeh ham itile chonset man thina ahi, Pathen thil mohpeh vang hi Pakai Christa Jesu vanga tonsot hinna ahi.
Ole, sopite, mihem ahinlai chansebovin danthun achungah thu aneiye, ti nahet louvuham? Danthu themho kahouna ahi.
Numei jineiya chu ainneipu ahinlai chansea danthun ainneiputoh akanbeh jing ahin, ajipa athi teng vangle ainneipu danthua kona chu ongdoh jia ahi.
Chuti ahijeh chun ainneipu hinpet’in midang ji hitahen hile, chutengle amanu chu ajonga kiti ding ahi. Ainneipu thi teng vangle, danthua kona onga ahitan, pasal dang ji hijongle ajonga hita lou ahi.
Nangho chungchang thua jong chutima chu ahi, sopite, Pathen lama iga theina dingule achom khat, athi lah-a kona thudohpa a nahi theina dinguva, Christa tahsa vanga danthu lama athisa a um nahitauve.
Ajeh chu tahsaphea ium laiseu chun danthua kona chonsetna lama chalohna chun thina lama iga theina dinguva, itibah chunguva na anatohji ahi.
Ahin tu vangin lekhajem luiya hilouva, lhagao thah-a ijen theina dinguva, ithiuva eikituhnau danthua kona kilhadoh ihitauve.

Achutile ipi isei dingu ham? Danthu hi chonsetna ham? Ahipoi; chonset chu ipi ahi anahe lou kahi, danthua kona kahetdoh ahibouve; ajeh chu, “Papset bol hih-in,” ti hi danthun aseilou hile, ipi ahi kanahet lou ding ahi.
Ahinla chonset chun agomkomcha atohkhan chuche thupeh-a kon chun kalunga papset imajouse asosahtan ahi; ajeh chu danthu beiya chonset chu athi ahi.
Masanglai chun danthu um louva anahing jing kahin, chuche thupeh ahung um phat chun chonset chu ahingdoh kit’in keima kathitai.
Chule hinna dinga thupeh chu thinajoh-in kananeitan ahi;
ijehham itile chonset chun agomkomcha atokhah jia thupeh-a chu eilheplhah a, hiche chun eitha ahi.
Chuti chu ahin danthu a thenge, thupeh jong athenge, adih lheh jengin aphai.

Ahile apha chu keima dinga thina mongham? Ahipoi, Apha chu amanchah a chonset chun kachunga thina asodoh-u kona chu, hichu chonset ahi tia akiphon dohna dinga chule thupeh vanga chonset chu setna chungnung tah ahi chu aki chetna dinga chonset jeh joh-a ahibouve.
Ajeh chu danthu chu lhagao lam thil ahi ti iheuve, keivang chu tahsaphe lam mi chonset soh a kijoh a kahi.
Ajeh chu keiman ipi kaboldoh kahepoi, ajeh iham itile kalunggot lou lam jeng kabol jin; kahot lam jengbou kabol jingjin ahi.
Kalunggot lou lam kabola ahile, danthu chu apha ahi tia oiya kahi.
Ahivangin tun abola keima hita louva keiya cheng chonset chun abol ahitabouve.
Ajeh chu keima sunga kasa chunga hin phat achengpoi, ti kahei, ajeh chu lunggotna vang chu aumin thilpha boldohna johho umlou ahi.
Ajeh iham itile apha kalunggot lam chu kabol jipon aphalou kalunggot lou lambou chun kachon jingjitan ahi.
Kalunggot lou lam kabolji ahile, abola chu keima hilouva keiya um chonsetjoh chu ahibouve.
Chuti chun thilpha bol kagot komle, setna chu kakoma ahung umjin, hiche umdanje hi kahetan ahi.
Kami sungnung in Pathen danthua kathanom lheh jinan.
ahivangin kalung lam danthu douva katibah chunga um, chonset dan-thu, soh a eipui lutjia katibah chunga hin danthu chom khat aum kamujin ahi.
Ohe! mi gentheitah chu kanahi! Hiche thina tahsaa kon hin koiyin eihuh-doh tan tem?
I-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa vangin Pathen kathangvah-e. Chuti chu ahi jeh a keiman kalung tah a Pathen danthu noiya kauma, kasa a chonset dan-thu soh na katoh ahi.
Chutia chu tu vanga Christa Jesua umho dinga themmo channa himhim umlou ahitai.
Ijeh ham itile Christa Jesua um hinna Lhagao danthu chun chonset le thina danthua kona eilhatdoh-a onga kahitai.
Ajeh chu tahsaphe lam hilouva Lhagao lama chon eiho, eiho chungchanga danthua chonna hi aguilhun theina dinga, danthu chu tahsaphe jeh-a ahatmoa abol jou lou chu,
Pathen in a-Chapa chu chonset thoinaa chonset po tahsaphe lim pua ahinsola, tahsaphea chu themmo achana abol ahi.
Ajeh iham itile tahsaphe lam dana chonseho chun tahsaphe lam thudol agelun; Lhagao lam dana chonho chun Lhagao lam thudol bou agelun ahi.
Tahsa lam lunggel chu thina ahin, Lhagao lam lunggel chu hinna le lungmonna ahi.
Ajeh chu tahsa lam lunggel chu Pathen douna ahin, Pathen danthu noiya ahipoi; hi jong ahi theipoi.
Chule tahsa lama chonho chun Pathen alunglhai thei pouve.
Pathen Lhagao nasunguva achen vangle, tahsa lama chon hilouva Lhagao lama chon nahiu ahi. Christa Lhagao neilou vang chu Christa a ahipoi.
Chule Christa chu nangho sunga auma ahile, chonset vanga tahsa chu athia ahin, lhagao vang chu chonphat vanga hinna ahi.

Chule athi lah a kona Jesu kaithou-pa Lhagao chu nangho sunga achen le, Christa Jesu mithi lah a kona kaithoupa-tah chun nangho sunga cheng ama Lhagao vanga chu natahsau thi thei jong chu ahinsah ding ahi.
Hijeh chun sopite, eihon bat inei-yuve, amavang tahsa lama chonna dinga neiya ihipouve.
Ajeh chu nangho tahsa lam dana nachon ule, iti jongle nathi tei dingu ahi; Lhagaova tahsa natoh chengse chu natha vangule, nahin dingu ahi.
Ajeh chu Pathen Lhagao kaihoiya umho chengse chu Pathen chate ahiuve.
Ajeh iham itile kichat kitna dinga sohchanna lhagao changa hilouvin, chapa hina lhagao changjoh nahibovui; hiche lhagao vanga chu, Abba! Hepa! tia ikoujiu ahi.
Lhagao chun amatah-in eiho lhagaotoh kithoa Pathen chate ihiu eihetsah-u ahi.
Chule chate ihi jouseuva gou lo ding ihiuve. Pathen gou lo ding, chule Christa toh lo khom ding ihiuve, amatoh choiat’a ium khom theina dinguva amatoh thoh khoma ihiule.
Tulaiya ithohnau hi khonunga ichan dingu loupina hung kilang ding chutoh kikot hoithem in kangaitopoi.
Thilsem chengse kinem ngui nguitah a Pathen chate hung kilah ding chu angalel lheh jengu ahi.
Ijeh ham itile thilsem chengse hi ahomkeo thu noiya aum hi ama chama um ahipoi. aumsahpa thusah-a um ahibovui;
thilsem chengse hi amatah jong kemthei soh a auma kona lhadoh a aumuva Pathen chate loupitah a anoma alennauva alut diu chu kinema um ahiuve.
Ahin tugei hin thilsem jouse naosonat thoh banga gim thoh-a peng penga um khom ahi ti iheuve.
Hiche jeng jong chu ahipoi, Lhagao ga masa changa eihotah jeng jong cha hina, itahsau lhat-doh-a um ding chu, ngah jinga ilung sungu peng penga um ihiuve.
Ajeh chu kinepna huhhing changa ihiuve; ahinla mua kinep chu kinep ahipoi; ajeh iham itile amua chu koi kinem ngai-yem?
Mu louva chu kinem ihiu vangle lungdettah a ngah jinga ihiuve.
Chuti chun Lhagao jongin ihatmo nauvah eikaihoiyun eihu jing jiuve; ajeh chu eihon adol lamtah a taoje ihepouve; ahivangin Lhagaovin eiho dingin sei thei louvin peng pengin eitaopeh jiuve,
Chule Pathen lunglam doltah cheh a mithengte dinga ataopeh jeh chun, lungthimgil kholtoh a Pathen chun Lhagao lunglam chu ahejin ahi.
Ahin Pathen ngailuho chengse, Ama lunggot lam doltah a kikouho ding vang chun, ijakaiya aphatna dingu a tong khom e, ti chu iheuve.
Ijeh ham itile sopihon tamtah lah a Pathen Chapa chu apeng masapen ahina dinga, Pathen in ahet ma-sahho chu a-Chapa lim banga agot masah-sa ahitai;
chule a got masahsaho chu kou jong akou ahi; chule akouho chu them jong achansah ahitai; chule them achansahho chu choi jong achoiat ahitai.
Chuti ahile hicheng thua hi ipi isei dingu ham? Pathen eiho lama apanle, koiham eidou thei dinguva?
A-Chapa khen louhela eiho jouse dinga pedoh jengpa chun eiho lungset mana ama chutoh thakhat’a ijakai eipeh khom lou dinguham?
Pathen lhanchom teho chu koiham ahehse dinga? Them chansah a Pathen ahibouve.
Themmo chansah a koi ham? Athia, achungchon cheh a athi lah-a kona kaithouva um Christa chu ahi; Ama Pathen jet lama atouvin eiho dingin eitaopeh jinguve.
Christa ngailutna a kona koiham eikhen dinga? Hesoh ganthei le, lungdonna, bolsetna, gilkel, pon beiya um, settona, chemjam, hicheng chun eikhen thei dingham?
Hiche dol jong hi akisune, “Keiho nangma jeh-in nilhum keiyin eikithat jingui; Tha dinga kigo kelngoi bangin eikisim tauve,” tin.
Ahinla eingailupau vangin hicheng thua hin eiho galjou sanga galjou ihiuve.
Ajeh chu i-Pakaiyu Christa Jesua um Pathen ngailutna kon chun thina, hinna, Vantil, vaipo pipu, tulai thudol la khonung a thun, thuneina,
chungle noi, a dan thilsem imachan eikhen thei lou dingu ahi, tia dettah a katahsan ahitai.
Keiman Christa a thutahbeh kasei ahi, kajoupoi;
kalunga lunghesohna nasatah le thohlel tang louhela aum hi, ase apha kahetna kalungin Lhagao Thengah eihet tohpin ahi.
Ajeh chu keimatah-in tahsa lama kanam khat pite kasopite khela Christa a kona manna lama dinga sedoh a uma sapset lhunna a umhel jeng ding kanagot ahi.
Israelte ahiuvin; chapa hina chu amauva ahin, loupina thulhun jouse, danthu peh, Pathen houna, chule thutep jousela amahoa ahin;
pute pate jong amahoa bou ahin, tahsaphe lama Christa jongla amaho lah a kon ahibovin, ama chu imajouse chunga chungnungpen Pathen ahin, akhang khanga pachat toh-tah ahi. Amen.
Ahivangin Pathen thu chu imacha hilouva um ahipoi. Ajeh chu Israel lah-a kon jouse Israel ahipoi.
Chule Abraham chilhah ahiu jong chu aboncha keiyun achate ahipouve. “Isaac’a konabou na-chilhah tia kisei ding ahi,” tia asei ahi.
Hichu hiti hi ahi, tahsa a chate chu Pathen chate ahipoi; thutep chatebou chu chilhah tia kisim ahi.
Thutep chu hiche hi ahi, “Hitih phattah hile kahung ding ahin, chutengle Sarah-in chapa khat ahin ding ahi,” ati.
Chucheng jeng ahi-poi, ahin Rebecca jong chu mi khat’a kona ipuluiyu Isaac’a kona agai laiyin,
acha-teni so masangin chule apha ase imacha abol masangin, toh vanga hilouva akoupa lunglam le Pathen in alhen dung juiya lunggotsa chu adetna dinga,
amanu jah-a, “A-upajo chun anaopa soh na atoh ding ahi,” tia kiseiya anahi.
Hiche thudola hin, “Keiman Jacob kana ngailu’n, Esau vang kanahot ahi,” tin akisune.
Achutile ipi isei dingu ham? Pathen’ah chondih louna aume iti dingu ham? Ahipoi.
Aman Mose jah-a, “Keiman kalungsetpa chu lungset ingting, kahepipa chubou kahepi ding ahi,” ati.
Chuti ahi jeh chun hiche hi alunga tuhpa vang jong hilouva, adelpa vang jong hilouva, alungsetpa Pathen vanga konjoh ahibouve.
Pathen lekhabu thun Pharaoh jah-a, “Nachunga kathilbol theina kavetsah theina dingle vannoi leiset a kamin kiphon jalna ding monga nangma katundoh nahi,” ati.
Chuti chu ahin Pathen in ahepi nomchan ahepjia, alunggot chan chu alung asuhtah ji ahi.
Hichea hin nangman kei jah-a, “Achutile ibola eithemmo sahji ham?” neitinate. Ajeh chu alunggot chu koiham akham theiya?
Ahipoi, vo mihem, Pathen douna a donbut nang koi nahim? Thilsem chun asempa jah-a, “Ibola hitia neisem ham,” tintem?
Belleiset lhang khat’a bel khat lutah-a dena, khat lulouva den ding, abelleiset chunga chu beldengpa chu acham cham hilouham?
Ahin, Pathen in alungsat vetsah nale athil bolthei hetsahna ding lung ngaitoa, mangthah dinga gotsa a um lungsatna bel-ho chunga a lung adesotle; chule aloupina dinga masanga pat’a agotsa ahile.
chuche alungset bel-ho chunga chu aloupina hao chu hetsah ding lung agot ahile, ipi hintem?
Aman lungset bel tia eiho, Judah lah-a kon jengseh hilouva, chidang namdangte lah-a kon jonga eikouvu ahi.
Chutobang chun Hosea lekhabuah, “Kamite hikhalou ho chu keiman kamite kati ding ahi. Kadeilounu chu kadeinu kati ding ahi;
Nangho keima mite nahipouve, tia ajah-uva kiseina laitah-a chu, Amaho Pathen hing chate kiti ding ahiuve,” tia kisei bang chu ahi.
Israelte thudol Isaiah-in asamlen. Israel chate twikhanglen kama neldi jat’in tam jongleu, amoh thembou sohcha ding ahi.
Ajeh iham itile Pakai chun athu asuh choma ajoa leiset chunga hi achai ding ahi.
Hiche thudol hi Isaiah-in masangin aseiye, “Janel Pakaiyin chikhai ding einakhen louvu hile, Sodom dung isun diu ahin, Gomorrah toh ibah dingu ahi,” ati.
Achutile ipi isei dingu ham? Chidang namdangten chonphatna nungdellou hela aphah-u ahitai; hichu tahsan vanga chonphatna ahi.
Chonphatna danthu nungdela Israelte’n la hiche dan chu apha jou tapouve.
Ijeh ham? Amahon tahsana hilouva, thilbola ahol jeh-u ahi. Kipal lhuhna songa kipal lhua ahitauve.
Hiche thudol jong hi akisune. “Veuvin, keiman Zion’ah kipalna song lunglhahna songpi kakoi ahi; Ahin ama tahsan chan chu jachatna chulou ding ahi.” akiti.
Sopite, kalunga kagotle amaho dinga Pathen henga kataona chu, huhhinga ahung um theina dingu ahipene.
Pathen lama agunchuve, ti chu keiman kahetsah ahi; ahivangin hichu hetna neiya gunchu ahipoi.
Ajeh chu amahon Pathen chonphatna ahet loujeh-ule, amahoa phudoh ding agot jeh-un, Pathen chonphatna ah alut tapouve.
Christa chu atahsan jouse dinga, chonphatna amu theina dinguva, danthu chaina ahi.
Chonphatna danthu nitpabou chu chuche achonphat vanga chu hing ding ahi, tin Mose’n asune.
Tahsana chonphat vang chun hitin aseiye. “Nangman nalungthim-in, “koiham vana kal ding?” (hichu Christa gapuilhah ding aseina ahi;)
ahiloule, “Koiham lei-onga kumlha ding?” (hichu athi lah-a kona Christa kaithou ding aseina ahi.) ti hih-in.
Ahin ipi aseiyem? Hiche thu chu nakomah aume, nakam sungle nalung sungah aume; hichu kaseiphongleu tahsan thu chu ahi.
Ajeh chu nangman nakama Jesu chu Pakai tia naphondoh-a chule Pathen in ama chu athi lah-a konin akaithouve, ti nalunga natahsan le, asohcha ding nahi.
Ajeh chu chonphatna dinga lunga tahsan ahin, sochatna dinga kama phondoh ahi.
Pathen lekhabu thun, “Koi hileh ama tahsan chan chu jachatna a chulou ding ahi,” ati.
Ijeh-inem itile Judah mite le Greek mite chu imacha chom ahipouve; abonchauva chungah Pakai khatsehbou aume, ahenga tao jouse dinga phatna haotah ahi.
Koi hileh Pakai mina tao chan chu huhhinga um ding ahi.
Achutile atahsan lou henga chu iti itao dingu ham? Athu jah lou chu iti atahsan dingu ham? Thusei phongle beiya iti ajah dingu ham?
Chule akisol loule, iti asei phongle dingu ham? Hiche thudol hitisan jong hin akisune, “Phatna Kipana Thupha seiphongle ho keng iti hoi tam!“
Ahivangin mi jousen Kipana Thupha angaipouve. Ajeh chu Isaiah-in jong, “Ka-Pakai, kathupha phonle koiham atahsana,” ati.
Chuti ahijeh chun thujah-a kon tahsan ahin, chule thu chu Christa thuhila kona hung um ahi.
Ahileh amahon ajah louvu ham? Ajanauve. “Aaw ginu gamtina athangin, Chule athuvin kolkimvel achan sohtai.“
Ahile, Israel miten ahet louvu ham? kati. Amasan Mose’n aseiyin. “Keiman nangho vai neilou vai khat thangset sah ungting, Lungthim neilou vai khat chunga kalung hansah ding nahiuve,” ati.
Isaiah-in jong hakattah-in aseiyin, “Eihol louten eimudoh-in, Eidong loute hengah kaki phongtai,” ati.
Israelte thu ding vang hitin aseiye, “Thua nung loute le nel hatte chunga kakhut kajah nilhum keiye,” ati.
Achutile Pathen in amite chu apailhah hitam? Ahipoi. Ajeh chu kei jong Abaraham chilhah-a Benjamin phunga Israel mi khat kahi.
Pathen in ahet masah amite chu apailhapoi. Pathen lekhabu thun Elijah thu asei hi nahet louvu ham? Aman Israelte chungchang thu Pathen henga alhut’in,
“Pakai, amahon Nangma themgao ho athatgam un. Nang houna maicham asuchimun, keima jong tha dingin eitup jingui,” ati.
Ahivangin Pathen in adonbut’a chu ipi aseiyem? “Keiman keiya dingin Baal anga dilsu louhel mi sang sagi kakikhennai,” ati.
Chutobangma chun tu laiyin jong lungset’a kilheng amoh moh aumnai.
Amavang hichu lungsetman a ahile, thilbol vanga ahipoi; chuti ahiloule lungset na hi lungsetna hita lou ahi.
Iti hitante ahile? Israel miten aholu chu amu louvu ahin, Pathen lhente honbou amu ahi; adang chengse chu alungtah chehtauvin ahi.
Pathen lekhabua, “Pathen in amaho khu imutsetna lhagao apen, amu thei louna dingun mit apen, jah thei louna nakhang apen ahi,” tia kisun bang chun tu geiyin aumna laiyuve.
David jongin, “Aan nehnau dokhang chu amaho dingin thang le pel hihen. Chule akipal nau le akiditnau hihen;
Amumona dingun amit’u thim hen. Chule nangman atingu bonsah jing jin,” tin aseiyin ahi.
Keiman, ahile alhuhna dinguva kipala hiuvam, kati. Ahinaisaipoi. Amavang amaho thangset sahna dinga, amaho suhkhel vanga chu chidang namdangte dinga sochatna ahitai.
Chule amaho suhkhel chu vannoiyin haona a aneiya, chule amaho hakam chu chidang nam-dangten haona a aneiya ahile, abulhinnau chu chusanga ijatna chungnung cheh ding hitam!
Keiman chidang namdang mi nang-ho jah-a kasei ahi. Keima chidang nam-dangte dinga solchah-a kapan jeh hin.
ijem tia kanam chanpite kathangset sah a alah-uva abang bang asochat theina dingun katin, lhacha a kapanna hi ka-loupisah lhehjeng ahi.
Ajeh chu amaho kipaidoh vannoiyin kichamna a aneiya ahile, amaho kilah kit chu athia kona hinna ding tailou, adang ipi hi ding ham?
Chule changbong lum amasa athena ahile, changlhah tum jouse apum-pia atheng ahi; chule ajung athenle a bah chengse jong athenga ahi.
Ahinla abah abang bang akiheboh a ahile, nangho gam olive bou nahiuvin, abah lah-a kijoma nahiuva, olive thing-phung ajunga kona phattheina changkha nahitah a nahile,
abahho chungah kithang-at hih-in. Kithang-at jongle chun, ajung vah-a nang nahipoi ajungbou chun nang navahjoh ahibouve.
Hichea hin nangman, “Keima kijopna dinga abahho kisubonga ahitai,” tinate.
Aphai, atah-san lou jeh a hicheho chu kisubonga ahin, nangma natahsan jala nadindet ahi. Hoitho hih-in, kichajon;
ajeh chu Pathen in abah tahbehbon akhen loule, nangma jong khenponate.
Chuti ahi jeh chun Pathen phatjele lungkhohje chu veuvin; alhu ho dinga chu lungkhoh-tah ahin, nangma ding vanga phatah ahi. Aphatna ah um jingin, achuti loule nangjong nakisatlha ding ahi.
Amaho chu tahsan louva aum jing louvule, kijom kit ding ahiuve, Pathen in amaho chu ajop kit thei ahi.
Ajeh iham itile apena pat’a gam olive phunga kona kisatlha a nangma, angai louva olive phungpha toh kijom nahile, apena pat’a abahtah ho chu olive toh iti kiha jopmat cheh ding hitam.
Sopite, hiche thuguh hi helouva naum dingu kanompoi, ajole hung kichih-sah khauvinate, chidang namdangte akim-soh kahsea Israel mite kimkhat chunga lungtahna chua ahi.
Chuti chu ahin Israelte jouse huhhinga um cheh ding ahi. Hiche thudol hi, “Zion a kona huhhingah hung ding ahi. Aman Jacob phunga kona Pathen ngaisah louna asuhmang ding ahi,
Chule achonsetnau kapailhah tengle, Hi hi amahotoh kakitepnau hi ding ahi,” tin akisune.
Amaho khu Kipana Thupha dola nangho jala melmahte ahiuvin, lhen-chom lam dola apu apateu jala deitahte ahiuve.
Ijeh ham itile Pathen in manbeiya athilpehho le akou chu lungkhel kit ahipoi.
Masangin Pathen thua nunglou nahiuvin tu vangin amaho louchal jeh-a lungsetna mua nahitauve.
Chule chuto bangma chu amahon jong, lungsetna namu jaluva hi lungsetna amu theina dinguva tua louchal a ahiuve.
Ijeh ham itile Pathen in mijouse alungset theina dinga thua nun louna a akhumchah ahitai.
Pathen chihna le hetna haoje hi athuh lheh jenge! Avaihom athutan hetphah hoi ahipoi, chule alampiho holdoh theihoi ahipoi!
“Ajeh chu Pakai lungthim chu koiham ahea? Chujongle lungthim pea anapanga koiham?
Alepeh kit dinga thilpha anape masa koiham?“
Ajeh chu ama a konle, ama vanga, chule ama dinga thil jouse anauma ahi. Loupina jouse atonsot atonsot geiyin amaa hi jinghen. Amen.

Chuti ahijeh chun, sopite, Pathen lungset vang hin natipumpiu chu longlhen thengtah gan kihinglha a bangin Pathen lah thei doltah-in Pathen ah kipeuvin, tia kahil nahiuve. Hichu nalunguva lhagaova nahounau ahi.
Chule nangho tulai vannoi leiset chon hin chon hih-un; Pathen lungdeilam, hichu apha, lah theile phat chamkim hi ipi ahi, nahetdoh theina dingun, lungthah kengunlang lim chom puvin.

Hijeh chun eipeh lungsetna vang hin nalah-uva mi chengse jah-a kasei ahi, agel dingdol kalvalin koiman kalene ti gel hihhen, amavang Pathen in apeh kham kham tahsanna dungjuiyin kituptah-in ngaito henlang lung geltoh hen.
Tipum khat’ah tibah tamtah-ineiyui, tibah jouse thakhat ahipoi, apanna akibangpon ahi.
Hibang chun eiho jong tamtah ihiuvin, Christa a ti khat ihiuve; khat chu khat tibah ihi cheh-un ahi.
Lungsetna eipeh bang cheh-un eithil peh-u achom cheh ineiyun ahi. Thusei phongna apehpan atahsan dungjuiyin sei hen;
sottola pang chu sottolin umhen; mihil’a chun mihil lamah;
mitilkhou chun mitilkhouna lamah kipehen; thil homan it louhelin hom hen; vaipoa pang chun gunchutah-in vai pohen; milungsetnan kipahtah-in lungset hen.
Ngailutna alem beihel hihen. Ase lam chu thetbol unlang apha chu kolchah jingun.
Kisopi ngailutna lamah kideito kisato cheh-in umun; kiginle kijana lamah amasajo ding kichuvin;
gunchuna lamah thase hih-un; lhagao lamah al jingun; Pakai lhachan pangun;
kinepna ah thanomun; genthei hesohna a thohhat’un; taona lamah pontho jingun;
mithengho lhahsam huna-in malphauvin kithopiuvin; jindot themun jalhaiyun.
Nabolseteu chu phatthei boh-un; samse louvin phatthei bohjovin.
Kipah thanomte chu kipa thanop piuvin; akapte chu kapiuvin.
Kitoh delin lungkhat’in chon cheh-un. Letna lam lung gellouvin aneo neotoh kiloiyun. Nangma chang kichihsah hih-in.
Mi setna chu setnan thuh hih un; mi jouse mit vet’ a apha chu bol ding go masauvin.
Chule ahi theiya ahile, najochanin mi jousetoh kihou theiyun kichamdelin umun.
Vo deitahte, kiphulah hih-un. Pathen lunghanna chu otdohjovin; ajeh chu Pakaiyin. “Phulah chu Keima kinbou ahi. Keiman lethuh nange,” ati, tin akisune.
Ahin namelmau chu agil akela ahile, an nehsah un; adang achah le, twi donsah un; chuti bolleu chun alu chunga meiam setkhompeh nahi dingu ahi.
Setna kijosah hih hel un, setna chu phatna-in joujovin.
Thunei chungnungte thu thun mi jouse nung chehhen; ajeh chu Pathen thusah louva thuneiya aumpoi, chule aum chengse hi Pathen pansah cheh ahiuve.
Chuti ahi jeh chun chuche thuneite douva chu Pathen thu douva ahi, chule adouho chun achunguva thutanna akiloikhum dingu ahi.
Ajeh iham itile vaipoho chu thilpha bolpa dinga kichat um hilouvin, ase bolpa dingabou kichat uma ahi. Thuneiho kicha louhelin umleng ti nagot’em? Thilpha bolin, chutile apachat nachan ding ahi;

ajeh chu nangma phattheina dinga ama Pathen sottola pang ahi. Ase nabol vangle kichan, aman chemjam adop khu moh-a adop ahipoi; ajeh chu ama Pathen sottol ahin, ase bolpa chunga lunghanga phula a pang ahi.
Hijeh chun lunghanna kichat man jenga athua nun ding ahipon, ase apha hetna jala jong athua nun ding ahi.
Hiche jeh a chu kai jong napehjiu ahi; ajeh chu amaho Pathen sottol hiuva hiti chu abol jing jengu ahi.
Peh ding dol jouse chu peuvin; kai pehdol kai peuvin; se choina dolah se choiyun; gin dingdol chu gingun; ja dingdol chu jauvin.
Khatle khat kingailutto cheh tailouvin koima imacha bat hih un; ajeh chu michom dang ngailua chun Pathen danthupeh chu asuh bulhit ahitai.
Ajeh iham itile, “Jon bol hih-in, tol that hih-in, Gucha hih-in, Papse hih-in,” ti thupeh dang um jongle, “Nangman nangma nakingailut bangin naheng nakom ngailun,” tia hin akai khom sohkeiyin ahi.
Ngailutna-in hengle kom setna abolpoi; hijeh chun ngailut hi danthu bukipna ahi.
Chule chuche ti louvin phat umchan hi naheuve; tu hi nangho dingin ihmut’a kona khah phat ahitai; ajeh chu eihon itahsan tiluva sang chun tu hin isochatnau anaitan ahi.
Jan asotjo achetai, sun ahung naitai; hiche jeh chun khaiye, muthim natoh pailhau hi tin khovah vonin kivonu hite.
Suna bangin hoitah-in umuhite; juneh motchon le jukhama um louvin, huh le jonthanhoi nei louvin, kinahna le kithangset beihel in umu hite.
Pakai Jesu Christa chu kivonjoh bovun, naphe phatna dingu tahsa lam ngaichat suhbulhit ding imacha go hih-un.
Tahsana hat louva chu nalah-uva lauvin, amavang atahsan bukim louna chu oimoa nol ding ahipoi.
Mi khat’in imajouse neh theiyin atahsan in, ahatmoa chun anche jengbou anei.
Anea chun anelou chu musit dahen; chule ane louvan anea chu oimo hihhen; ijeh ham itile ama chu Pathen in alahsa ahi.
Mi insung soh oimoa nang koi nahim? Adin le alhuh apakai pa a bou ahi. Ahi, Pakai chun adinsah thei ahi jeh-a chu ama chu adinsah ding ahi.
Mi abang khat’in nikho khat nikho dang dang sangin ajabol tumin, abang kimkhat’in nikho jouse kibangin ajabolin ahi. Mi jousen ama lung sunga kihetchen chehhen.
Nikho jabola chun Pakai choiatnaa ajabol ahin; chule ima nea jong chun Pathen alhai jeh chun Pakai choiatnaa aneh ahi; anelou jong chun Pathen athangvah-a Pakai dinga anehda ahi.
Ijeh ham itile eiho koima ama dinga hinga ihipouve, chule koima ama dinga thia ihipouve.
I-hinle Pakai dinga hing ihiuvin, ithiu jongle Pakai dinga thia ihibovui; hijeh chun hing jongleuhen Pakai dinga hing ihiuvin, thi jong leuhen Pakai dinga thia ihiuve.
Ajeh chu athile ahing Pakai ahikop theina dinga hi, Christa thia chua hingdoh kit ahi.
Ahin ibola nangin nasopi na-oimo ham? Chujongle nangin nasopi ibola musit nahim? Ajeh chu Pathen laltouna anga ibonchauva idin dingu ahinalaiye.
Pakaiyin, “Mi namkim ka anga dilsu cheh ding ahi. Leijousen Pathen avahchoiya aphondoh ding ahi. Tia kahinna a kahahsel ahi,” tin akisune.
Chuti ahi jeh a chu ibonchauva Pathen henga eima chonchan cheh ikisei dingu ahi.
Hijeh chun tukal kioimoto tapouhite; hiche sang chun hiche hi ngaito jovin, sopi anga lunglhahna le kipal lhuhna koi lou ding ahi.
Thil angai monga thenglou aumpoi, ti hi Pakai Jesuah kahechen in katahsan lheh jengin ahi; amavang mi khattouvin thilboh ahi, tia angaito chu ama dinga hichu athenglou ahijie.
Nehle chah chunga nasopi alungphatmo le ngailutna thua chon talou nahi. Adinga Christa thia ahitan, ama chu nangman naneh nachahin sumang hih-in.
Hijeh chun naphatnau chu seiset’in um hihhen;
ajeh chu Pathen gam chu anneh twidon thua ahipoi; chonphatna, lungmonna, Lhagao Thenga kipana johbou chu Pathen gam thupi ahi.
Ajeh iham itile koi hileh chuti thua Christa lhacha a pang chu Pathen lung lamtah ahin, mihem in jong, ahi, tia aphot chen ahi.
Hijeh chun kichamdela umna dingle khantou theina kibolpehto lamah kihabolu hite.
Neh le chah jeh-in Pathen natoh suse hih helun. Thil jouse athengnan ahi, ahinla ikhat neh-a lunglhahna chu anepa dinga setna ahi.
Sa neh hijongle, lengpitwi don hijongle, adang ipi hijongle, nasopi kipal lhuhna chu bolda hela pha ahi.
Tahsan nanei chu Pathen angah nangman het’in nei jingin; aphalam ahi ti ngaitoa themmoa kingaito loupa chu mi nunnom ahi.

Amavang lungsa-ih puma nepa chu themmo changa ahitai; ajeh iham itile tahsanna neiya aneh ahipoi; chule ipi hijongle tahsanna nei louva bol chu chonset ahi. Nang kilung lhailouvin naheng nakom joh lunglhaiyin.
Chuti ahi eiho ahat cheng hin eima lunglhaina hoi louva ahatmote hatmona chu ipoh hujoh dingu ahi.
Eiho khat cheh-in iheng ikoma houthu lama khantou sahna dinga aphatna dingu ngaitoa lunglhai sah ding ahi.
Ajeh chu Christa jeng jong ama kilunglhai lou ahi; ahin, “Nahousehon nahousetnau chu keima chungah achutai,” tia kisun bangjoh chu ahibouve.
Ajeh chu nidang laiya thu kisun chengse chu, lekha kisun Pathen thua kona thohhatle lungmonna imuva kinepna inei theina dinguva, eiho kihilna dinga kisun ahi.
Nanghon lung khatle kam khat’a i-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa Pa Pathen nachoiat theina dingun,
thohhat le lungmon konna Pathen in Christa lunglam doltah-in,’ khatle khat lungkhat putsah cheh-un.
Hichena ding chun Pathen loupi choiatna dinga Christan nangho nalah bangu chun, khat le khat kilatouvin.

Ijeh-inem itile keiman hiche kasei hi, iputeu ipateu athutep chu phutdet dingle Pathen lungset jala chidang namdang ten Pathen achoiat theina dinguva, Pathen thu adih chu hetsah dinga, Christa chu cheptanho lhacha a hung panga ahitai.
Hiti jong hin akisune, “Hiche jeh chun keiman chidang namdangte lah-a, Nangma kipah-in phong ingting; Chule nangma min in la jong sange.“
Hitin ati kit leuve, “Vo chidang namdangte, amitetoh kipah thanom khomun;“
chukitle, “Vo chidang namdangte, nabonchauvin Pakai chu vahchoiyun. Chule mi jousen ama vahchoiyuhen,” ati.
Chule Isaiah-in jong, “Jesse jung chu um ding ahin. Chule chidang namdangte chunga vaipo dinga hung sohdoh ding ahi; Ama chu chidang namdangten kinepna a anei dingu ahi,” ati.
Lhagao Theng thahat vanga kinepna nanei letset theina dingun, kinepna Pathen in natahsan nau chu kipa thanop le chamna lungmonna-in dip letset tahen.
Kasopite ho, nang ho chung chang thua chun, nangmaho tah phatna dimsetle hetna bukip sohkei nahiuvin, khat le khat kitilkhouto thei nahiuve, ti keimatah-in kahetchen ahi.
Ahivangin chidang namdangte lah a Christa Jesu lhacha a kapan theina dinga Pathen in eipeh lungsetna vanga hi hangho geldoh sahna dinga akah lahlah-a hakat cheh a naheng uva kahinsut ahi.
Chidang namdangte chu longlhen kihing lha banga Lhagao Theng suhthenga athenuva, lah thei ahina dinguva, Pathen Thupha lhacha a kapan ahi.
Hijeh chun tun Pathen dinga natohna lama hin Christa Jesuah kisonna kaneiye.

Ajeh chu melchihna kidangle thilbol kidang apat’a Lhagao Theng thahat’a chidang namdangte Pathen thua nunsah dinga, thusei lama jong thilbol lama jong, Christa’a keima eimanchah a abol chengse tailou chu, imadang kasei ngam ding aumpoi.
Chuti chu ahin Jerusalem le akimvela pat’in Illyricum geiyin Christa thupha hi kaphongjal sohkeitan ahi.
Chule midang bulphusa chunga insa kahi louva, “Ama thudol kisei pohna khahloute chun amu dingu ahin. Chule ajakha loute chun ahet dingu ahi,“
tia kisun bang chu ahinajoh dinga, hichena dinga chu Christa min kiphondoh louna mun muna seiphongle ding, kalungtup lheh ahi.
Hiche jehtah-a jong chu hijatvei nahenguva kahung ding hiche chun eisuhmo jingji ahi.
Tu vangin hiche gamkai sungah kanatohna ding mun aumtapoi; kum sot a pat’a nangho henga hung ding kagot jingma ahin.
Spain gam lama kache phat phatle nangho mupange tin kakinemin ahi, chule amasan nanghotoh kivopkhamsei ing ting chule kache tengjongle nanghon neihung thahleu chun kati.
Tu vang hin mithengte gahu dinga Jerusalem a chetadi ding kahi.
Ajeh chu Macedonia le Achaia gama mihon Jerusalem a um mithengte lah a migenthei vaichaho huna a sumto ding aphasah tauvin ahi.
Ahi, pha jong asauvin abat’u jong ahi; ajeh chu lhagao lama namdangte akikoppiuva ahile, leiset thil lama amahon abat’u ahin, ahu dingdol mongu ahi.
Chuche jeh chun chuche kin chu kachai tengle asumdonu chu phatecha a kapehdoh joule, nangho kom hinjot pangting Spain gam lama kachepai peh ding ahi.
Chule nahenguva kahung tengle chun, Christa phattheina chamkim keiya hinpoa hung ding kahi, ti kahei.
Sopite, Judea gama cheng sei ngailouho khut’a kona kahoi theiya, Jerusalem a kin neiya kachena hi,
mithengten anatah theina dingun, chule Pathen phatsah a kipahtah a nangho heng lama kahunga nanghotoh kakicholdo theina dingin.
Pathen henga taona a hahun neihuvin tia Pakai Jesu Christa le Lhagao Thengin eipeh-u ngailutna vanga nangho kahinngeh nahiuve.
Chamnale lungmon konna Pathen in nabon chauvin umpiuvin. Amen.
Isopinu u Phoebe, Cenchreae Houbung lhachanu hi Pakai minin mithengte chonna a lomtah-in analauvin;
chule nahunau angaichatna chanah anahuvin tia nangho amanu hitoh kakihet tohsah nahiuve; ajeh iham itile amanu hin mi tamtah ahun chule keimatah jeng jong eihun ahi.
Jesu Christa a katoh khompi kahinkho huhna a alol doa Prisca le Aquila kasalam anapeuvin;
kei chang hilouvin chidang namdangte lah-a Houbung mi jousen jong apahchauvin ahi.
Chule aina kikhom Houbung mite jong chu salam anapeuvin. Kasahtah Epaenetus, Asia gama Christa tahsan masapen chu salam anapeuvin.
Nadinguva na hatoh-a tonggim Mary jong kasalam anapeuvin.
Ka inkole kasoh chanpi Andronicus le Junias solchahho lah a minchepen keima sanga Christa a lut masa amani jong chu kasalam anapeuvin.
Pakaiya kasahtah Ampliatus chu kasalam anapeuvin.
Christa a itohgimpiu Urbanus le kasahtah Stachys salam anapeuvin.
Christa a mi kitah kichen Apelles salam peuvin. Aristobulus insung miho jong salam peuvin.
Ka inko Herodion kasalam anapeuvin. Narcissus te inko Pakaiya um cheng chu kasalam anapeuvin.
Pakaiya na hatohgim Tryphaena le Tryphosa salam anapeuvin. Dei umtah Persis Pakaiya na ahatoh lheh jengin, ama chu kasalam anapeuvin.
Pakaiya lhen Rufus le kanu tobang anu chu salam anapeuvin.
Asyncritus, Phlegon, Hermes, Patrobas, Hennas, hicheng chule aumpiu sopite chengse salam anapeuvin.
Philologus le Julia, Nereus le asopinu, Olympas, chule amahotoh kikhom mithengte cheng-se salam anapeuvin.
Khat le khat salam kibohtovin lang thengtah-in kichop’un, Christa Houbung mite jousen salam napeuve.
Vo sopite, kangehnau ahi, thu nakihil chengu chu akalea, kikhen chehna dingle kipal lhuhna semteho chu anamel-gel unlang, amahoa konin anachom umun.

Ijeh-inem itile chutobang miho chun i-Pakaiyu Christa lhacha na tong louvin aoisung dingu lhacha na tong jengbou ahiuve; chule kamthem le thungei ngeiyin suhset neilouho lung dohan a-lhemlha jiuvin ahi.
Nasei ngaijeu chu vannoiyah akithangdoh tan ahi. Hiche jeh chun nachunguvah kakipah lheh jenge; amavang nangho apha lama chingun lang ase lamah lunglhom leu chun kalung ahi.
Chule chamna lungmonna Pathen in satan chu nakengto noiyuva achil ngem-vah ding ahinai. Pakai Jesu Christa lungset chu nalah-uva um jinghen.
Katoh khompi Timothy chule ka-inko Lucius, Jason chule Sosipater hiteho chun salam nahin peuve.
Chule hiche lekhasun Tertius keiman Pakaiyah nangho salam kahin peuve.
Keima le Houbung mite jouse lhunna Gaius chun salam napeuve. Hiche khopia sumdol Erastus le sopi Quartus-in salam napeuve.
I-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa lungsetna chun nabonchauvin umpijing-un, Amen.
Ka-thupha hil le Jesu Christa thuphon bangtah a, tonsot’a pat’a kiim thuguh chu tua akiphondoh bang tah-a,
tahsan thua ahung nunna dinguva tonsot’a Pathen thupeh dungjui tah-a, themgao ho lekhabun aphondoh-a, chitinle namtin jouse ahetsah ahitan;
nangho sudet thei Pathen chinga khatseh chu Jesu Christa vangin tonsot geiyin loupi jing hen. Amen.
